title: 🌟Enchantrax✨  New Books!
description: Gives unique visuals to enchanted books enhancing the enchantment experience and the magicness in minecraft
body:
![Enchantrax Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef87e16d72b0596bd32d34b9db05576a27002727.png)

**Enchantrax gives a whole new feeling to enchanting in minecraft, giving unique visuals to each book to making easier to identify the enchants you are looking for**

---

<details>
<summary>BOOK WIKI</summary>

## 
Each level, the books get a new "ore badge", sometimes it can have more details highglights or change its color

The "Ore Badge" can be STONE/Coal > Iron > Gold > Diamond > Emerald > Amethyst
![ORE BADGES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a648cc947bd80b36a73a7e52128282c8a6c98f7.png)

The Details on the books can be additional stuff

![Fortune](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3c0af74d807ff09521dbfcf97ea3dfb8201e232.png)

The Details on the books can be change of colors

![Density](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31e1997968aee7bd4ac4b8750330575c4e056e3e.png)

The Details on the books can also change its design to give a feeling of intensity

![Bane of Arthropods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66b74100749efed2e4b04b0440525271b46f8341.png)

</details>

### Can you identify each enchantment just by ONE Image?
![Can you identify each enchantment just by ONE Image?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57ff6e3c64174512fbd2a81baad2e6d22154a8e4.png)
